sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 108 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.9, 22 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.138/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2022 without any process even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On the last date, brief was held and adjournment was sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel. The adjournment was granted and a fixed date was given for today. Today, once again Mr. M. Aqeel Qureshi, advocate holds brief and seeks adjournment on behalf of applicant’s counsel for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
